accepted_source_residuals.translation: RenderMan Release Notes（RenderMan 发布说明）

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 欢迎使用 RenderMan for Katana！
RenderMan Release Notes（RenderMan 发布说明）

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Instanced lights with filters using the "Light Filter" coordsys have an incorrect transform. The workaround is to promote the light filter to a shared light filter using a light filter reference.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 使用 "Light Filter" coordsys 的带 filter instanced lights 会产生不正确的 transform。解决方法是使用 light filter reference 将该 light filter 提升为 shared light filter。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: We do not receive live render edits from Katana for nodes added at the end of the node graph, right above the Render node.  If a no-op node (e.g. Merge) is inserted above the Render node and the node is added above that then the edit is received.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 对于添加在 node graph 末尾、正好位于 Render node 上方的 nodes，我们不会从 Katana 接收到 live render edits。如果在 Render node 上方插入一个 no-op node（例如 Merge），然后把该 node 添加在它上方，则可以接收到 edit。

accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.source: Any live updates will cause interactive motion blur to be disabled. The render must be restarted to see motion blur.
accepted_ascii_heavy_rows.translation: 任何 live updates 都会导致 interactive motion blur 被禁用。必须重新启动 render 才能看到 motion blur。
